TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == satangahan == niyazu' nu Cipawkan i Kalingku. u sulit nu Hulam: 吉寶干/德安部落 Cipawkan i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Cipawkan. u kasalumaluma' nu Cipawkan sa, 2,448 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 6,662 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,051 ku tademaw, pakalatu 16%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5,611 ku tademaw, pakalatu 84%. u kasabinacadan, Amis 13%, Truku 2%, zumazuma 0.5%. duut ku Pangcah(Amis) itini, caayka duut kuzuma a tademaw. malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan == nijazuʔ~ʡ nu ʦipawkan i kar~ɾiŋku. u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam: ***/**** ʦipawkan i ħuar~ɾiən a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu ʦipawkan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu ʦipawkan sa, *,*** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *,*** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *,*** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, *,*** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, amis **%, truku *%, zumazuma *.*%. duut ku paŋʦaħ(amis) itini, ʦaajka duut kuzuma a tadəmaw. mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan
S.FORM: == satangahan == niyazu' nu Cipawkan i Kalingku. u sulit nu Hulam: 吉寶干/德安部落 Cipawkan i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Cipawkan. u kasalumaluma' nu Cipawkan sa, 2,448 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 6,662 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,051 ku tademaw, pakalatu 16%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5,611 ku tademaw, pakalatu 84%. u kasabinacadan, Amis 13%, Truku 2%, zumazuma 0.5%. duut ku Pangcah(Amis) itini, caayka duut kuzuma a tademaw. malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan == nijazuʔ~ʡ nu ʦipawkan i kar~ɾiŋku. u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam: ***/**** ʦipawkan i ħuar~ɾiən a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu ʦipawkan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu ʦipawkan sa, *,*** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *,*** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *,*** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, *,*** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, amis **%, truku *%, zumazuma *.*%. duut ku paŋʦaħ(amis) itini, ʦaajka duut kuzuma a tadəmaw. mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan
